deep_dive.title: TF-MoE: Time-Frequency Mixture-of-Experts for Efficient Speech Separation
deep_dive.abstract: Recent advances in speech separation (SS) have led to compact front-end models with small parameter sizes, yet their high computational cost remains a major barrier for deployment on edge devices. To address this, we propose TF-MoE, a sparse Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) framework that enhances model capacity with almost no increase in inference cost. Our method introduces dynamic expert specialization in time and frequency dimensions through alternating time-wise and frequency-wise MoE modules, each dynamically selecting experts per frame or mel band. Built upon a mel-band-splitting Conformer backbone, TF-MoE achieves strong performance on SS tasks under low-compute settings. Experimental results demonstrate that TF-MoE consistently improves separation performance under computation cost constraints, outperforming BSRNN by +3.8 dB SDR on Libri2Mix with comparable 4.1 GMACs/s inference cost. This positions TF-MoE as a promising candidate for edge-device deployment.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 用于低推理成本的MoE框架
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 用于低推理成本的MoE框架
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 用于低推理成本的MoE框架
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: TF-MoE proposes a sparse Mixture-of-Experts framework for speech separation that enhances model capacity with almost no increase in inference cost by introducing dynamic expert specialization in time and frequency dimensions.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 现有语音分离模型虽小但计算成本高，难以部署在边缘设备。本文提出TF-MoE，一种稀疏MoE框架，通过交替时间维和频率维的MoE模块动态选择专家，在不增加推理成本的前提下大幅提升模型容量。实验表明在低计算场景下性能优异。该工作为MoE的高效推理提供了新思路。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 现有语音分离模型虽小但计算成本高，难以部署在边缘设备。本文提出TF-MoE，一种稀疏MoE框架，通过交替时间维和频率维的MoE模块动态选择专家，在不增加推理成本的前提下大幅提升模型容量。实验表明在低计算场景下性能优异。该工作为MoE的高效推理提供了新思路。
deep_dive.matched_query_text: efficient mixture of experts inference techniques

quick_skim.title: Learning to Select, Not Relearn: Hard-Routed Mixtures of Reasoning LoRAs
quick_skim.abstract: Composing independently trained LoRA adapters into a single large language model is useful for multi-domain adaptation, especially when the original training data cannot be shared. A common approach is to use MoE-style routing over LoRA experts, but for frozen pretrained adapters, soft weighted combinations can change the unit-scale additive update under which each LoRA module was originally trained. We propose \textbf{Hard-Routed MoR-LoRA}, a two-stage framework for composing frozen reasoning LoRA experts through unit-scale hard selection. First, domain-specific LoRA adapters are trained independently using reinforcement learning from verifiable feedback to obtain reasoning experts. Then, all experts are frozen, reasoning traces are distilled from them, and only a lightweight shared router together with a small attention LoRA is trained for integration. The router selects exactly one expert per token using hard top-1 routing, while a straight-through estimator enables gradient-based training. Experiments across five benchmarks, multiple model scales, and additional model families show that Hard-Routed MoR-LoRA preserves expert behavior while requiring substantially fewer trainable parameters than soft-routing mixture baselines. Our analysis further shows that normalized soft mixtures often concentrate most routing mass on a single expert, suggesting that hard unit-scale routing provides a simple and efficient abstraction for frozen LoRA expert composition.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: hard-routed MoE for efficient inference with frozen LoRA experts
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 硬路由MoE实现冻结LoRA专家高效推理
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 硬路由MoE实现冻结LoRA专家高效推理
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 硬路由MoE实现冻结LoRA专家高效推理
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Proposes Hard-Routed MoR-LoRA for composing frozen reasoning LoRA experts via unit-scale hard selection, improving inference efficiency without retraining.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对独立训练LoRA适配器组合时软加权破坏原训练尺度的问题，提出硬路由MoR-LoRA框架：先通过强化学习训练领域特定推理LoRA专家，再冻结所有专家并利用硬选择蒸馏推理轨迹。该方法在保持性能的同时提升推理效率，避免重新训练。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 针对独立训练LoRA适配器组合时软加权破坏原训练尺度的问题，提出硬路由MoR-LoRA框架：先通过强化学习训练领域特定推理LoRA专家，再冻结所有专家并利用硬选择蒸馏推理轨迹。该方法在保持性能的同时提升推理效率，避免重新训练。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: Papers central to MoE 推理，带有 group kernel 和量化, especially work that connects or combines: efficient mixture of experts inference techniques; group kernel optimization for transformer models; weight quantization for large language models; grouped kernel decoding for moe models; quantized mixture of experts model inference; efficient inference for mixture of experts models using group kernel and quantization; kernel fusion techniques for grouped expert computation in MoE; quantized mixture of experts inference with group kernel optimization.

quick_skim.title: RaBitQCache: Rotated Binary Quantization for KVCache in Long Context LLM Inference
quick_skim.abstract: Long-context Large Language Model inference is severely bottlenecked by the massive Key-Value (KV) cache, yet existing sparse attention methods often suffer from static fixed-budget (Top-k) retrieval or rely on proxy scores that are computationally expensive and biased. To address these limitations, we propose RaBitQCache, a novel sparse attention framework that utilizes randomized rotated binary quantization and high-throughput binary-INT4 arithmetic to efficiently estimate attention weights. Our proxy score serves as an unbiased estimator with a proven error bound, enabling adaptive Top-p retrieval that dynamically adjusts the token budget based on actual attention sparsity. We further implement a hardware-aware system with asynchronous pipelining and lazy updates to mask overhead. Evaluations demonstrate that RaBitQCache significantly accelerates inference and reduces memory I/O while preserving generation quality compared to state-of-the-art baselines. Code is available at https://github.com/Sakuraaa0/RaBitQCache.git.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: Rotated binary quantization for KV cache in LLM inference
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 针对LLM推理的KV缓存旋转二值量化
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 针对LLM推理的KV缓存旋转二值量化
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 针对LLM推理的KV缓存旋转二值量化
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Proposes RaBitQCache, a sparse attention framework using rotated binary quantization and binary-INT4 arithmetic to efficiently estimate attention weights for long-context LLM inference.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 长上下文LLM推理受限于庞大KV缓存，现有稀疏注意力方法静态且计算昂贵。提出RaBitQCache，利用旋转二值量化和高速二进制-INT4算术，实现无偏注意力权重估计，支持自适应Top-p检索。硬件感知系统异步流水线化，在长序列上显著加速推理，同时保持精度。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 长上下文LLM推理受限于庞大KV缓存，现有稀疏注意力方法静态且计算昂贵。提出RaBitQCache，利用旋转二值量化和高速二进制-INT4算术，实现无偏注意力权重估计，支持自适应Top-p检索。硬件感知系统异步流水线化，在长序列上显著加速推理，同时保持精度。
